examples: He was created a baronet in 1715.
The baronet was pale, but calm and self-possessed.
Red Hand - Usual mark for a baronet if borne on a small escutcheon.
Sir George Young, an old Etonian known as the "bicycling baronet, " is one of the most experienced members of the coalition government.
The defendant passed around business cards announcing himself as the 13th Baronet of England and once used the name Mountbatten, he said.
